name: Hummus with Tomato Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the chickpeas, reserving 1/4 cup liquid.
2. Squeeze the juice from the lemon.
3. Mince the garlic.
4. Puree the chickpeas and reserved liquid in a food processor with lemon juice, garlic, tahini, olive oil, and salt until very smooth.
5. Chop the onion and tomato.
6. Toss the chopped onion and tomato with the parsley.
7. Arrange the hummus on a plate and place the relish next to it.
8. Drizzle the hummus with additional olive oil.
This dish has 201 calories per serving and the recipe makes 6 servings.
